structured_payload_candidate.title: Refrigerant Recovery Nominal Pressure
structured_payload_candidate.summary: System recovers refrigerant until a nominal pressure of around 3 to 4 psig (25 kPa) is achieved.

structured_payload_candidate.title: R134a Liquid Refrigerant Temperature During Recovery
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For R134a, liquid refrigerant temperature during recovery at 25 kPa is likely around -5°F to -10°F (roughly -22°C).
